---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**
What are you trying to do that engram makes hard today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. If it touches sharing or other assistants, note which
phase it fits (see [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md)).

**Alternatives considered**
Anything else you tried or thought about.
